message:
feat(observability): implement thread-local context stack for DiagnosticContext

DiagnosticContext::enter() and ::current() were previously placeholders.
Implement real push/pop semantics using a thread-local CONTEXT_STACK
(RefCell<Vec<ContextStackEntry>>).

enter() pushes the context onto the stack and returns a ContextGuard
that removes it on drop. current() returns the top-of-stack context
(or an empty context if none). ContextGuard contains a unique monotonic
ID and uses rposition for removal, so out-of-order drops work correctly
(dropping a middle guard leaves the top unchanged).

Add PhantomData<Rc<()>> to ContextGuard to ensure it is !Send, which
is correct since thread-local state must not be transferred across
threads.

Update SpanId::new() comment from "random" to "monotonically
increasing" to reflect actual behavior. Update cx.rs trace() method
doc from "placeholder" to describe its actual behavior.

Add tests: basic enter/restore, nested contexts, out-of-order drop.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
